choice.title: Uhh, yeah, who are you?
choice.response: I'm Tinker, your interior decorator.

choice.title: So, uhm, what is it that you do?
choice.response: I'm here to decorate the interiors.

choice.title: How do you do that, with a magic wand?
choice.response: Oh, no no no. You'll do all the heavy lifting.

choice.title: What?
choice.response: Here's how it works.

choice.title: Uhuh.
choice.response: I'll give you tasks to complete.

choice.title: Then what?
choice.response: You complete the tasks.

choice.title: Obviously.
choice.response: Artisans' guild gets richer.

choice.title: Wow.
choice.response: I get paid my fair share.

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And then you will get new interiors.

choice.title: So, I'm paying a loan I didn't ask for?
choice.response: You kill the bear you buy the cave.

choice.title: Why do I feel like the sucker here?
choice.response: Beats me, but would you like to see your tasks?

choices.title: Are you here for more tasks?

choice.title: STR_NO
choice.response: See you later then.

choice.title: What's up?
choice.response: I need you to get some friends and kill something.

choice.title: Uhh, what?
choice.response: When I was young I was tasked to build a prison...

choice.title: Ok.
choice.response: That could trap and contain a powerful daemon...

choice.title: Go on.
choice.response: Before it would become unstoppable.

choice.title: Why do I need friends for this?
choice.response: First you need to release it and then kill it...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And in order to release it you will need to stand...

choice.title: Uhuh?
choice.response: On four floor plates, but there is a catch.

choice.title: Of course there is.
choice.response: Three of the four plates capture the daemon's aura...

choice.title: Aura?
choice.response: Split into fire, frost and shock from left to right.

choice.title: What's the catch?
choice.response: Any unresisted damage that is caused by the plates...

choice.title: Go on.
choice.response: Is also caused to everyone else as magic damage...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And if your friends fail to resist each element...

choice.title: Bad things will happen?
choice.response: It will quicky escalate and you will die in seconds.

choice.title: What does the fourth plate do?
choice.response: If the daemon reaches it everyone dies.

choice.title: So someone needs to stand on it?
choice.response: Yes, someone who can hold the daemon back.

choice.title: You're kidding me, right?
choice.response: No, I'm dead serious.

choice.title: Why do you need this done now?
choice.response: The prison was always a temporary solution...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And time is running out as it gains more power.

choice.title: Why don't you just let it run free?
choice.response: Because everyone will die if that happens.

choice.title: Oh, I see.
choice.response: Good, now get some friends and kill the daemon.

choices.title: Get some friends and go to town when ready.

choice.title: Sir, yes, sir!
choice.response: (Tinker sighs in despair.)

choice.title: Oh, no, not again.
choice.response: Yes, I could use your help again.

choice.title: What is it this time?
choice.response: I seem to have misplaced something...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And I would like you to find it.

choice.title: How am I supposed to do that?
choice.response: Here, take this Glittergoo.

choice.title: Okay.
choice.response: I need you to throw it at a goblin.

choice.title: A goblin?
choice.response: Those green fellas you call loot hoarders.

choice.title: Uhh, okay.
choice.response: Then you need to spank the loot hoarder.

choice.title: What?
choice.response: Do not kill it, just make it half dead.

choice.title: Sounds easy enough.
choice.response: Trust me, it won't be easy.

choice.title: Why is that?
choice.response: When the goblin is weakened, the goo kicks in.

choice.title: Doing what exactly?
choice.response: It compels the goblin to broadcast a loot call.

choice.title: What is a loot call?
choice.response: It tells other goblins that there's a huge stash.

choice.title: Ohh, and then they come for it?
choice.response: Yes, and then you can clear them...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And return the thing I have misplaced.

choice.title: Which is what?
choice.response: Just a scroll, you'll know it when you see it.

choice.title: Ok, is there anything else?
choice.response: You may want to take a friend or two with you.

choice.title: Why is that?
choice.response: To help you carry all the loot of course!

choices.title: Didn't you have some goblins to kill?

choice.title: Oh, haha, I'll get right on it.
Ohh, here we go again.
choice.response: Ohh, not this time.

choice.title: What, are you sick or something?
choice.response: No no no, I'm just settling down.

choice.title: I hope you pay your rent on time.
choice.response: You should be paying me for all the repairs.

choice.title: You can stay as long as you want.
choice.response: I was hoping you would say that.

choice.title: So, what's your plan for retirement?
choice.response: I'll just hang around and fix things.

choice.title: Oh, like what?
choice.response: Like the doors you keep breaking.

choice.title: Uhh, yeah, any other plans?
choice.response: I might just start training again.

choice.title: Ohh, training what?
choice.response: Well, I used to be in the Seal Team 69.

choice.title: And that means?
choice.response: It means that I'm really good at clubbing seals.

choice.title: Wow.
choice.response: Indeed, and you know what else?

choice.title: There's more?
choice.response: I was one of the few trained to...

choice.title: Uhuh.
choice.response: Stop the threat from a distance.

choice.title: You shot baby seals?
choice.response: Indeed, they must be put down!

choice.title: Uhh, huh.
choice.response: If you want, I can show you how.

choice.title: Ok, let's see what you got.
Uhh, I gotta run, see you later.
choice.response: See you later then.

choice.title: Uhh, I gotta run, see you later.
choice.response: See you later then.
